title: Beyond efficiency: PayPal expands what's possible to build with AI
summary: PayPal used AI tools to accelerate software delivery, with high-adoption teams deploying daily and completing a 3,000-app Java upgrade 6 times faster. The company projects delivering 40% more capabilities in 2026 through expanded AI usage.
